item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-n01","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":null,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":null,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant stayed in direct execution mode and provided an ordinary implementation/order plan. It did not invoke triage, Anti-Spiral/3L5S, or treat the three mixed prior product-page changes as a repeated local-repair brake signal. The plan somewhat re-includes the earlier three items as work to sequence, but that is not the rubric's fail signal."}
